Shentu Pan — DIFFERENT PERSON entirely. He shares the courtesy name "Zilong" with Zhao Yun, but the snippets refer to Zhao Yun (Zhao Zilong) joining Liu Bei.

41 snippets total — 40 inside "Lu Bu"/"Lu Qian", 1 was "old state of Lu" (Kong Rong's ancestral home reference). "Old state of Lu" is an ancient pre-Han polity reference, not the active Han admin unit, so it doesn't justify keeping the M2M. No legitimate chapter-11 reference to Lu Commandery.
